TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ray Carles (雷．查爾斯; Inkiris: Ray Charles, 1930 miheca 9 folad 23 romi'ad-2004 miheca 6 folad 10 romi'ad), tadangangan ci Ray Carles Ropinsen (Inkiris: Ray Charles Robinson), no salo'afangan maradiway, piano no Amilika, patekaay no sararimokay a ongkak. O sarakatay mapacomoday i matirtiray kero a tamdaw , "Matirtiray casi" patodong cingraan to "100 satadamaanay romadiway" a saka 2 tamdaw . Sacisowal sa ci Frank Sinatra i cingraan o "Matanengay to ongkak a dengan" saan . Ka'emangan 'orip O wawa no matayalay ci Bailey Robinson aci Aretha williams ci Ray Carles Ropinsen. O mama ci Bailey Robinson o pakaomahan a maomahay, misanga'ay to lalan no kisya, kikay a sayho ato maamaan a tayalan . O ina ningra ci Aretha o pakoyoc a masawawaay ho a fafahiyan, miti'eray to laloma'an ni Bailey a ma'orip; itiraay i Greenville no Florida, mikapot ci Bailey ato fafahi ningra ci Mary Jane Robinson ma'orip. Itiya o laloma'an ni Ropinsen madipot ci Aretha, saka pakafit hananay to Ropinsen a ngangan. Ikor pakayni i ka'odang ni Bailey ko saka cipoyapoy ni Aretha, itira i 1930 miheca kaciherangan miliyas to Greenville, mikapot to laloma'an i Albany no Georgia, mipatala to kasofocan to wawa. Ikor minokay cingra ato wawa tayra i Greenville, itiya pasowal to niyah pasifana' to ni'oripan ci Mary Jane ici Thunder Charles. O ma'imeray to pitoor ci Aretha, mapolong mikihatiya to pilihay i kiwkay . Maolah ci Ray Carles Ropinsen tio ina ningra, mihirateng ko kodaitay, pakoniyahay ko ka'orip a kalata'angen, o nianan ko palalanay a dawdaw to rakat no 'orip ningra. Mihekeno ko mama ci Bailey ningra to loma', miliyas to Greenville, cifafahi to roma fafahiyan . Kafahekaan ni Carles ko kikay i kaemang ho ningra, mararid manengneng ningra ko fiyaw nangra matayal to tosiya ato kangkang a kikay. 3 ho ko miheca ningra masafaloco' to ko ongkak naitira i kakomaenan to kohi ni Wylie Pitman a mapalowad, tona ira ko piano ni Pitman midatok, halo pasifana' han ci Carles a minanam to piano . Hanatayra ko ina aci Carles i Kahengangay kohian, hamhamen to katayra nangra i Kahengangay kohian, ngalef mapadama cangra to kacango'ot itira. Madipot ho ni Pitman ko safa ningra ci George, milowan to rarima no ina nangra. Nika o safa 4 ka mihecaan ni George itira i pifaca'an to riko' a ma'ap'ap mapatay . Nanoya ko halisafa no kaka ci Carles a mararom tomangic to lasa' itiya sa mapohaw to ko mata ningra , tangasa i 7 ko miheca o caay to pakanengneng a mapohaw . Onkak a tayal I 1949 miheca 4 folad, ci Carles ato ongkak sakapot ningra mirina' to radiw "Palisomad langdaway" , saka sa'ayaway o karadiwan i polong no kitakit, macakat tayra i "Pakafitan kasarayray masararimokay a ongkak" a saka 2 . Talacowa matayal to, misanga' haca cingra to roma maradiway to raradiwen nangra, halo ni Cole Porter a "Kacahcahan no salo'afang" ato ni Dizzy Gillespie a "Aymanon" (Emanon) . I 1959 miheca mihapiw ci Carles to Atlantic likoto a radiw to "Manan ko nisowalan ako?" , o nian ko katangasa i takaraway no tayal, o kalifotan a radiw konini, palakapot to ratoh, jazz, blues ato Latin a ongkak; ikor sacisowal sa cingra o naitiraay i club a nisanga'an saan. Padoedo i 1960 miheca mihapiw to radiw "I faloco'ay ako a Georgia" , malanga'ayay a sowalen no kitakit ato pahofien to Grammy a kompay ci Carles itiya . Padoedo to radiw "Pasilala a Jack" o roma a saka ci hofi to Grammy a kompay ni Carles, onini a sararimokay blues a romadiway ci Percy Mayfield ko misanga'ay . Kapatayan I 2003 miheca, to nikanga'ay pakafit to no pakah a tokad ni Carles, o mamipadoedo miliyok karomadiw na saan i, madadenga to roma a lacaan no tatirengan a mapalasawad aca. 2004 miheca 6 folad 10 romi'ad itira i Beverly Hills, California loma ni Carles a mapatay, patihi ko laloma'an ato widawidang ningra , o saka patay ningra o nano 'atayan adada , ira ko 73 ko mihecaan. Matadem i 2004 miheca 6 folad 18 romi'ad, itira i First AME kiwkay no Los Angeles, mihakitiyaay to pitademan ira ko maradiway tamdaw ci mimingay Richard, B. B. King aci Stevie Wonder . Ni sanga'an radiw I Got a Woman (1954) What'd I Say (1959) Georgia on My Mind (1960) Hit the Road Jack (1961) One Mint Julep (1961) Unchain My Heart (1961) I Can't Stop Loving You (1962) Ika Swingin' Along (1961) Ballad in Blue (1964) The Big T.N.T. Show (1966) The Blues Brothers (1980) Limit Up (1989) Listen Up: The Lives of Quincy Jones (1990) Love Affair (1994) Spy Hard (1996) The Extreme Adventures of Super Dave (2000) Blue's Big Musical Movie (2000) "雷之心靈傳奇"(2004)
S.PHON: raj ʦarɾəs (*****; inkiris: raj ʦħarɾəs, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan ʦi raj ʦarɾəs ro~upinsən (inkiris: raj ʦħarɾəs ro~ub~b~vinso~un), no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋan maraɬ~ɮiwaj, piano~u no~u amiɾika, patəkaaj no~u sararimo~ukaj a o~uŋkak. o~u sarakataj mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj i matirtiraj kəro~u a tamɬ~ɮaw , "matirtiraj ʦasi" pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦiŋraan to~u "*** sataɬ~ɮamaanaj ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj" a saka * tamɬ~ɮaw . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦi frank sinatra i ʦiŋraan o~u "matanəŋaj to~u o~uŋkak a ɬ~ɮəŋan" saan . kaʡəmaŋan ʡo~urip o~u wawa no~u matajaɾaj ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj ro~ub~b~vinso~un aʦi arətħa wiɾɾiams ʦi raj ʦarɾəs ro~upinsən. o~u mama ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj ro~ub~b~vinso~un o~u pakao~umaħan a mao~umaħaj, misaŋaʡaj to~u ɾaɾan no~u kisja, kikaj a sajħo~u ato~u maamaan a tajaɾan . o~u ina niŋra ʦi arətħa o~u pako~ujo~uʦ a masawawaaj ħo~u a fafaħijan, mitiʡəraj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni b~b~vaiɾəj a maʡo~urip; itiraaj i *rəənb~viɾɾə no~u fɾo~uriɬ~ɮa, mikapo~ut ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj ato~u fafaħi niŋra ʦi marj *anə ro~ub~b~vinso~un maʡo~urip. itija o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni ro~upinsən maɬ~ɮipo~ut ʦi arətħa, saka pakafit ħananaj to~u ro~upinsən a ŋaŋan. iko~ur pakajni i kaʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋ ni b~b~vaiɾəj ko~u saka ʦipo~ujapo~uj ni arətħa, itira i **** miħəʦa kaʦiħəraŋan miɾijas to~u *rəənb~viɾɾə, mikapo~ut to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan i aɾb~b~vanj no~u *əo~ur*ia, mipataɾa to~u kaso~ufo~uʦan to~u wawa. iko~ur mino~ukaj ʦiŋra ato~u wawa tajra i *rəənb~viɾɾə, itija paso~uwaɾ to~u nijaħ pasifanaʡ to~u niʡo~uripan ʦi marj *anə iʦi tħo~u~unɬ~ɮər ʦħarɾəs. o~u maʡiməraj to~u pito~uo~ur ʦi arətħa, mapo~uɾo~uŋ mikiħatija to~u piɾiħaj i kiwkaj . mao~uɾaħ ʦi raj ʦarɾəs ro~upinsən tio~u ina niŋra, miħiratəŋ ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj, pako~unijaħaj ko~u kaʡo~urip a kaɾataʡaŋən, o~u nianan ko~u paɾaɾanaj a ɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw to~u rakat no~u ʡo~urip niŋra. miħəkəno~u ko~u mama ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj niŋra to~u ɾo~umaʡ, miɾijas to~u *rəənb~viɾɾə, ʦifafaħi to~u ro~uma fafaħijan . kafaħəkaan ni ʦarɾəs ko~u kikaj i kaəmaŋ ħo~u niŋra, marariɬ~ɮ manəŋnəŋ niŋra ko~u fijaw naŋra matajaɾ to~u to~usija ato~u kaŋkaŋ a kikaj. * ħo~u ko~u miħəʦa niŋra masafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ko~u o~uŋkak naitira i kako~umaənan to~u ko~uħi ni wjɾiə pitman a mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ, to~una ira ko~u piano~u ni pitman miɬ~ɮato~uk, ħaɾo~u pasifanaʡ ħan ʦi ʦarɾəs a minanam to~u piano~u . ħanatajra ko~u ina aʦi ʦarɾəs i kaħəŋaŋaj ko~uħian, ħamħamən to~u katajra naŋra i kaħəŋaŋaj ko~uħian, ŋaɾəf mapaɬ~ɮama ʦaŋra to~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut itira. maɬ~ɮipo~ut ħo~u ni pitman ko~u safa niŋra ʦi *əo~ur*ə, miɾo~uwan to~u rarima no~u ina naŋra. nika o~u safa * ka miħəʦaan ni *əo~ur*ə itira i pifaʦaʡan to~u riko~uʡ a maʡapʡap mapataj . nano~uja ko~u ħaɾisafa no~u kaka ʦi ʦarɾəs a mararo~um to~umaŋiʦ to~u ɾasaʡ itija sa mapo~uħaw to~u ko~u mata niŋra , taŋasa i * ko~u miħəʦa o~u ʦaaj to~u pakanəŋnəŋ a mapo~uħaw . o~unkak a tajaɾ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ʦarɾəs ato~u o~uŋkak sakapo~ut niŋra mirinaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw "paɾiso~umaɬ~ɮ ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj" , saka saʡajawaj o~u karaɬ~ɮiwan i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit, maʦakat tajra i "pakafitan kasarajraj masararimo~ukaj a o~uŋkak" a saka * . taɾaʦo~uwa matajaɾ to~u, misaŋaʡ ħaʦa ʦiŋra to~u ro~uma maraɬ~ɮiwaj to~u raraɬ~ɮiwən naŋra, ħaɾo~u ni ʦo~uɾə po~urtər a "kaʦaħʦaħan no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ" ato~u ni ɬ~ɮi**j *iɾɾəspiə a "ajmano~un" (əmano~un) . i **** miħəʦa miħapiw ʦi ʦarɾəs to~u atɾantiʦ ɾiko~uto~u a raɬ~ɮiw to~u "manan ko~u niso~uwaɾan ako~u?" , o~u nian ko~u kataŋasa i takarawaj no~u tajaɾ, o~u kaɾifo~utan a raɬ~ɮiw ko~unini, paɾakapo~ut to~u rato~uħ, ja**, b~b~vɾo~u~uəs ato~u ɾatin a o~uŋkak; iko~ur saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra o~u naitiraaj i ʦɾo~u~ub~b~v a nisaŋaʡan saan. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u i **** miħəʦa miħapiw to~u raɬ~ɮiw "i faɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ako~u a *əo~ur*ia" , maɾaŋaʡajaj a so~uwaɾən no~u kitakit ato~u paħo~ufiən to~u *rammj a ko~umpaj ʦi ʦarɾəs itija . paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u raɬ~ɮiw "pasiɾaɾa a *aʦk" o~u ro~uma a saka ʦi ħo~ufi to~u *rammj a ko~umpaj ni ʦarɾəs, o~unini a sararimo~ukaj b~b~vɾo~u~uəs a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi pərʦj majfiəɾɬ~ɮ ko~u misaŋaʡaj . kapatajan i **** miħəʦa, to~u nikaŋaʡaj pakafit to~u no~u pakaħ a to~ukaɬ~ɮ ni ʦarɾəs, o~u mamipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɾijo~uk karo~umaɬ~ɮiw na saan i, maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋa to~u ro~uma a ɾaʦaan no~u tatirəŋan a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ aʦa. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i b~b~vəb~vərɾj ħiɾɾs, ʦaɾifo~urnia ɾo~uma ni ʦarɾəs a mapataj, patiħi ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ niŋra , o~u saka pataj niŋra o~u nano~u ʡatajan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa , ira ko~u ** ko~u miħəʦaan. mataɬ~ɮəm i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira i first amə kiwkaj no~u ɾo~us aŋəɾəs, miħakitijaaj to~u pitaɬ~ɮəman ira ko~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi mimiŋaj riʦħarɬ~ɮ, b~b~v. b~b~v. kiŋ aʦi stəb~viə wo~unɬ~ɮər . ni saŋaʡan raɬ~ɮiw i *o~ut a wo~uman (****) wħatʡɬ~ɮ i saj (****) *əo~ur*ia o~un mj minɬ~ɮ (****) ħit tħə ro~uaɬ~ɮ *aʦk (****) o~unə mint *o~u~uɾəp (****) o~u~unʦħain mj ħəart (****) i ʦanʡt sto~up ɾo~ub~viŋ jo~uo~u~u (****) ika swiŋinʡ aɾo~uŋ (****) b~b~vaɾɾaɬ~ɮ in b~b~vɾo~u~uə (****) tħə b~b~vi* t.n.t. sħo~uw (****) tħə b~b~vɾo~u~uəs b~b~vro~utħərs (****) ɾimit o~u~up (****) ɾistən o~u~up: tħə ɾib~vəs o~uf *o~u~uinʦj *o~unəs (****) ɾo~ub~və affair (****) spj ħarɬ~ɮ (****) tħə əxtrəmə aɬ~ɮb~vənto~u~urəs o~uf so~u~upər ɬ~ɮab~və (****) b~b~vɾo~u~uəʡs b~b~vi* mo~u~usiʦaɾ mo~ub~viə (****) "******"(****)
S.FORM: Ray Carles (雷．查爾斯; Inkiris: Ray Charles, 1930 miheca 9 folad 23 romi'ad-2004 miheca 6 folad 10 romi'ad), tadangangan ci Ray Carles Ropinsen (Inkiris: Ray Charles Robinson), no salo'afangan maradiway, piano no Amilika, patekaay no sararimokay a ongkak. O sarakatay mapacomoday i matirtiray kero a tamdaw , "Matirtiray casi" patodong cingraan to "100 satadamaanay romadiway" a saka 2 tamdaw . Sacisowal sa ci Frank Sinatra i cingraan o "Matanengay to ongkak a dengan" saan . Ka'emangan 'orip O wawa no matayalay ci Bailey Robinson aci Aretha williams ci Ray Carles Ropinsen. O mama ci Bailey Robinson o pakaomahan a maomahay, misanga'ay to lalan no kisya, kikay a sayho ato maamaan a tayalan . O ina ningra ci Aretha o pakoyoc a masawawaay ho a fafahiyan, miti'eray to laloma'an ni Bailey a ma'orip; itiraay i Greenville no Florida, mikapot ci Bailey ato fafahi ningra ci Mary Jane Robinson ma'orip. Itiya o laloma'an ni Ropinsen madipot ci Aretha, saka pakafit hananay to Ropinsen a ngangan. Ikor pakayni i ka'odang ni Bailey ko saka cipoyapoy ni Aretha, itira i 1930 miheca kaciherangan miliyas to Greenville, mikapot to laloma'an i Albany no Georgia, mipatala to kasofocan to wawa. Ikor minokay cingra ato wawa tayra i Greenville, itiya pasowal to niyah pasifana' to ni'oripan ci Mary Jane ici Thunder Charles. O ma'imeray to pitoor ci Aretha, mapolong mikihatiya to pilihay i kiwkay . Maolah ci Ray Carles Ropinsen tio ina ningra, mihirateng ko kodaitay, pakoniyahay ko ka'orip a kalata'angen, o nianan ko palalanay a dawdaw to rakat no 'orip ningra. Mihekeno ko mama ci Bailey ningra to loma', miliyas to Greenville, cifafahi to roma fafahiyan . Kafahekaan ni Carles ko kikay i kaemang ho ningra, mararid manengneng ningra ko fiyaw nangra matayal to tosiya ato kangkang a kikay. 3 ho ko miheca ningra masafaloco' to ko ongkak naitira i kakomaenan to kohi ni Wylie Pitman a mapalowad, tona ira ko piano ni Pitman midatok, halo pasifana' han ci Carles a minanam to piano . Hanatayra ko ina aci Carles i Kahengangay kohian, hamhamen to katayra nangra i Kahengangay kohian, ngalef mapadama cangra to kacango'ot itira. Madipot ho ni Pitman ko safa ningra ci George, milowan to rarima no ina nangra. Nika o safa 4 ka mihecaan ni George itira i pifaca'an to riko' a ma'ap'ap mapatay . Nanoya ko halisafa no kaka ci Carles a mararom tomangic to lasa' itiya sa mapohaw to ko mata ningra , tangasa i 7 ko miheca o caay to pakanengneng a mapohaw . Onkak a tayal I 1949 miheca 4 folad, ci Carles ato ongkak sakapot ningra mirina' to radiw "Palisomad langdaway" , saka sa'ayaway o karadiwan i polong no kitakit, macakat tayra i "Pakafitan kasarayray masararimokay a ongkak" a saka 2 . Talacowa matayal to, misanga' haca cingra to roma maradiway to raradiwen nangra, halo ni Cole Porter a "Kacahcahan no salo'afang" ato ni Dizzy Gillespie a "Aymanon" (Emanon) . I 1959 miheca mihapiw ci Carles to Atlantic likoto a radiw to "Manan ko nisowalan ako?" , o nian ko katangasa i takaraway no tayal, o kalifotan a radiw konini, palakapot to ratoh, jazz, blues ato Latin a ongkak; ikor sacisowal sa cingra o naitiraay i club a nisanga'an saan. Padoedo i 1960 miheca mihapiw to radiw "I faloco'ay ako a Georgia" , malanga'ayay a sowalen no kitakit ato pahofien to Grammy a kompay ci Carles itiya . Padoedo to radiw "Pasilala a Jack" o roma a saka ci hofi to Grammy a kompay ni Carles, onini a sararimokay blues a romadiway ci Percy Mayfield ko misanga'ay . Kapatayan I 2003 miheca, to nikanga'ay pakafit to no pakah a tokad ni Carles, o mamipadoedo miliyok karomadiw na saan i, madadenga to roma a lacaan no tatirengan a mapalasawad aca. 2004 miheca 6 folad 10 romi'ad itira i Beverly Hills, California loma ni Carles a mapatay, patihi ko laloma'an ato widawidang ningra , o saka patay ningra o nano 'atayan adada , ira ko 73 ko mihecaan. Matadem i 2004 miheca 6 folad 18 romi'ad, itira i First AME kiwkay no Los Angeles, mihakitiyaay to pitademan ira ko maradiway tamdaw ci mimingay Richard, B. B. King aci Stevie Wonder . Ni sanga'an radiw I Got a Woman (1954) What'd I Say (1959) Georgia on My Mind (1960) Hit the Road Jack (1961) One Mint Julep (1961) Unchain My Heart (1961) I Can't Stop Loving You (1962) Ika Swingin' Along (1961) Ballad in Blue (1964) The Big T.N.T. Show (1966) The Blues Brothers (1980) Limit Up (1989) Listen Up: The Lives of Quincy Jones (1990) Love Affair (1994) Spy Hard (1996) The Extreme Adventures of Super Dave (2000) Blue's Big Musical Movie (2000) "雷之心靈傳奇"(2004)
S.PHON: raj ʦarɾəs (*****; inkiris: raj ʦħarɾəs, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan ʦi raj ʦarɾəs ro~upinsən (inkiris: raj ʦħarɾəs ro~ub~b~vinso~un), no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋan maraɬ~ɮiwaj, piano~u no~u amiɾika, patəkaaj no~u sararimo~ukaj a o~uŋkak. o~u sarakataj mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj i matirtiraj kəro~u a tamɬ~ɮaw , "matirtiraj ʦasi" pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦiŋraan to~u "*** sataɬ~ɮamaanaj ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj" a saka * tamɬ~ɮaw . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦi frank sinatra i ʦiŋraan o~u "matanəŋaj to~u o~uŋkak a ɬ~ɮəŋan" saan . kaʡəmaŋan ʡo~urip o~u wawa no~u matajaɾaj ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj ro~ub~b~vinso~un aʦi arətħa wiɾɾiams ʦi raj ʦarɾəs ro~upinsən. o~u mama ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj ro~ub~b~vinso~un o~u pakao~umaħan a mao~umaħaj, misaŋaʡaj to~u ɾaɾan no~u kisja, kikaj a sajħo~u ato~u maamaan a tajaɾan . o~u ina niŋra ʦi arətħa o~u pako~ujo~uʦ a masawawaaj ħo~u a fafaħijan, mitiʡəraj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni b~b~vaiɾəj a maʡo~urip; itiraaj i *rəənb~viɾɾə no~u fɾo~uriɬ~ɮa, mikapo~ut ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj ato~u fafaħi niŋra ʦi marj *anə ro~ub~b~vinso~un maʡo~urip. itija o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni ro~upinsən maɬ~ɮipo~ut ʦi arətħa, saka pakafit ħananaj to~u ro~upinsən a ŋaŋan. iko~ur pakajni i kaʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋ ni b~b~vaiɾəj ko~u saka ʦipo~ujapo~uj ni arətħa, itira i **** miħəʦa kaʦiħəraŋan miɾijas to~u *rəənb~viɾɾə, mikapo~ut to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan i aɾb~b~vanj no~u *əo~ur*ia, mipataɾa to~u kaso~ufo~uʦan to~u wawa. iko~ur mino~ukaj ʦiŋra ato~u wawa tajra i *rəənb~viɾɾə, itija paso~uwaɾ to~u nijaħ pasifanaʡ to~u niʡo~uripan ʦi marj *anə iʦi tħo~u~unɬ~ɮər ʦħarɾəs. o~u maʡiməraj to~u pito~uo~ur ʦi arətħa, mapo~uɾo~uŋ mikiħatija to~u piɾiħaj i kiwkaj . mao~uɾaħ ʦi raj ʦarɾəs ro~upinsən tio~u ina niŋra, miħiratəŋ ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj, pako~unijaħaj ko~u kaʡo~urip a kaɾataʡaŋən, o~u nianan ko~u paɾaɾanaj a ɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw to~u rakat no~u ʡo~urip niŋra. miħəkəno~u ko~u mama ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj niŋra to~u ɾo~umaʡ, miɾijas to~u *rəənb~viɾɾə, ʦifafaħi to~u ro~uma fafaħijan . kafaħəkaan ni ʦarɾəs ko~u kikaj i kaəmaŋ ħo~u niŋra, marariɬ~ɮ manəŋnəŋ niŋra ko~u fijaw naŋra matajaɾ to~u to~usija ato~u kaŋkaŋ a kikaj. * ħo~u ko~u miħəʦa niŋra masafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ko~u o~uŋkak naitira i kako~umaənan to~u ko~uħi ni wjɾiə pitman a mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ, to~una ira ko~u piano~u ni pitman miɬ~ɮato~uk, ħaɾo~u pasifanaʡ ħan ʦi ʦarɾəs a minanam to~u piano~u . ħanatajra ko~u ina aʦi ʦarɾəs i kaħəŋaŋaj ko~uħian, ħamħamən to~u katajra naŋra i kaħəŋaŋaj ko~uħian, ŋaɾəf mapaɬ~ɮama ʦaŋra to~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut itira. maɬ~ɮipo~ut ħo~u ni pitman ko~u safa niŋra ʦi *əo~ur*ə, miɾo~uwan to~u rarima no~u ina naŋra. nika o~u safa * ka miħəʦaan ni *əo~ur*ə itira i pifaʦaʡan to~u riko~uʡ a maʡapʡap mapataj . nano~uja ko~u ħaɾisafa no~u kaka ʦi ʦarɾəs a mararo~um to~umaŋiʦ to~u ɾasaʡ itija sa mapo~uħaw to~u ko~u mata niŋra , taŋasa i * ko~u miħəʦa o~u ʦaaj to~u pakanəŋnəŋ a mapo~uħaw . o~unkak a tajaɾ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ʦarɾəs ato~u o~uŋkak sakapo~ut niŋra mirinaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw "paɾiso~umaɬ~ɮ ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj" , saka saʡajawaj o~u karaɬ~ɮiwan i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit, maʦakat tajra i "pakafitan kasarajraj masararimo~ukaj a o~uŋkak" a saka * . taɾaʦo~uwa matajaɾ to~u, misaŋaʡ ħaʦa ʦiŋra to~u ro~uma maraɬ~ɮiwaj to~u raraɬ~ɮiwən naŋra, ħaɾo~u ni ʦo~uɾə po~urtər a "kaʦaħʦaħan no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ" ato~u ni ɬ~ɮi**j *iɾɾəspiə a "ajmano~un" (əmano~un) . i **** miħəʦa miħapiw ʦi ʦarɾəs to~u atɾantiʦ ɾiko~uto~u a raɬ~ɮiw to~u "manan ko~u niso~uwaɾan ako~u?" , o~u nian ko~u kataŋasa i takarawaj no~u tajaɾ, o~u kaɾifo~utan a raɬ~ɮiw ko~unini, paɾakapo~ut to~u rato~uħ, ja**, b~b~vɾo~u~uəs ato~u ɾatin a o~uŋkak; iko~ur saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra o~u naitiraaj i ʦɾo~u~ub~b~v a nisaŋaʡan saan. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u i **** miħəʦa miħapiw to~u raɬ~ɮiw "i faɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ako~u a *əo~ur*ia" , maɾaŋaʡajaj a so~uwaɾən no~u kitakit ato~u paħo~ufiən to~u *rammj a ko~umpaj ʦi ʦarɾəs itija . paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u raɬ~ɮiw "pasiɾaɾa a *aʦk" o~u ro~uma a saka ʦi ħo~ufi to~u *rammj a ko~umpaj ni ʦarɾəs, o~unini a sararimo~ukaj b~b~vɾo~u~uəs a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi pərʦj majfiəɾɬ~ɮ ko~u misaŋaʡaj . kapatajan i **** miħəʦa, to~u nikaŋaʡaj pakafit to~u no~u pakaħ a to~ukaɬ~ɮ ni ʦarɾəs, o~u mamipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɾijo~uk karo~umaɬ~ɮiw na saan i, maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋa to~u ro~uma a ɾaʦaan no~u tatirəŋan a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ aʦa. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i b~b~vəb~vərɾj ħiɾɾs, ʦaɾifo~urnia ɾo~uma ni ʦarɾəs a mapataj, patiħi ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ niŋra , o~u saka pataj niŋra o~u nano~u ʡatajan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa , ira ko~u ** ko~u miħəʦaan. mataɬ~ɮəm i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira i first amə kiwkaj no~u ɾo~us aŋəɾəs, miħakitijaaj to~u pitaɬ~ɮəman ira ko~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi mimiŋaj riʦħarɬ~ɮ, b~b~v. b~b~v. kiŋ aʦi stəb~viə wo~unɬ~ɮər . ni saŋaʡan raɬ~ɮiw i *o~ut a wo~uman (****) wħatʡɬ~ɮ i saj (****) *əo~ur*ia o~un mj minɬ~ɮ (****) ħit tħə ro~uaɬ~ɮ *aʦk (****) o~unə mint *o~u~uɾəp (****) o~u~unʦħain mj ħəart (****) i ʦanʡt sto~up ɾo~ub~viŋ jo~uo~u~u (****) ika swiŋinʡ aɾo~uŋ (****) b~b~vaɾɾaɬ~ɮ in b~b~vɾo~u~uə (****) tħə b~b~vi* t.n.t. sħo~uw (****) tħə b~b~vɾo~u~uəs b~b~vro~utħərs (****) ɾimit o~u~up (****) ɾistən o~u~up: tħə ɾib~vəs o~uf *o~u~uinʦj *o~unəs (****) ɾo~ub~və affair (****) spj ħarɬ~ɮ (****) tħə əxtrəmə aɬ~ɮb~vənto~u~urəs o~uf so~u~upər ɬ~ɮab~və (****) b~b~vɾo~u~uəʡs b~b~vi* mo~u~usiʦaɾ mo~ub~viə (****) "******"(****)
